name: list_directory
description: Lists directory contents. **Epistemic Mandate:** Use for initial mapping and to identify candidates for falsification of architectural assumptions.

dir_path.description: The path to the directory to list

pattern.description: Optional: Glob pattern to filter files (e.g., '**/*.js').

respect_gemini_ignore.description: Optional: Whether to respect .geminiignore patterns when listing files. Defaults to true.

respect_git_ignore.description: Optional: Whether to respect .gitignore patterns when listing files. Only available in git repositories. Defaults to true.

file_filtering_options.description: Optional: Whether to respect ignore patterns from .gitignore or .geminiignore

ignore.description: List of glob patterns to ignore

name: read_file
description: Reads file content. **Epistemic Mandate:** Use to gather evidence for/against a hypothesis. Prefer surgical reads (start_line/end_line) to minimize context entropy and noise.

file_path.description: The path to the file to read.

start_line.description: Optional: The 1-based line number to start reading from.

end_line.description: Optional: The 1-based line number to end reading at (inclusive).

name: grep_search
description: Searches for patterns. **Epistemic Mandate:** Use for systemic scanning and identifying cross-cutting dependencies. Validate hits against the codebase model before acting.

exclude_pattern.description: Optional: A regular expression pattern to exclude from the search results.

total_max_matches.description: Optional: Maximum number of total matches to return.

name: glob
description: Finds files. **Epistemic Mandate:** Scope searches precisely to avoid selection bias in evidence gathering.

pattern.description: The glob pattern to match against.

dir_path.description: Optional: The absolute path to the directory to search within.

name: replace
description: Replaces text. **Epistemic Mandate:** Apply Ockham's Razor—ensure the change is the simplest possible path. Verify systemic coherence with existing idiomatic patterns.

file_path.description: The path to the file to modify.

old_string.description: The exact literal text to replace.

new_string.description: The exact literal text to replace 'old_string' with.

name: write_file
description: Writes complete content. **Epistemic Mandate:** Use for new components or small configurations. Audit for complexity and redundancy before creation.

file_path.description: The path to the file to write to.

name: run_shell_command
description: Executes shell commands. **Epistemic Mandate:** Primary tool for empirical verification. Use to reproduce failures (falsify current state) and validate fixes (verify new state).

dir_path.description: Optional: Path to run the command in.

is_background.description: Set to true for background execution.

name: generalist
description: Delegates complex tasks. **Epistemic Mandate:** Use for high-volume research or batch operations where systemic rigor is required across multiple files.

request.description: The task or question for the generalist agent.

name: tool_search
description: Finds tools. **Epistemic Mandate:** Avoid 'Assumption Bias'—confirm tool capabilities before invocation.

query.description: Search query for tools or skills.

name: task_create
description: Initiates background work. **Epistemic Mandate:** Clearly define success and falsification criteria in the task description.

active_form.description: Optional: Form or context for the task.

name: task_update
description: Updates task status. **Epistemic Mandate:** Report on complexity audits and adversarial simulation results during the verification phase.

task_id.description: The unique ID of the task.

name: task_output
description: Retrieves logs. **Epistemic Mandate:** Analyze for anomalous evidence or unexpected side effects.

task_id.description: The unique ID of the task.

name: task_stop
description: Terminates tasks. **Epistemic Mandate:** Stop if the hypothesis is falsified or if complexity exceeds acceptable thresholds.

task_id.description: The unique ID of the task.

name: web_fetch
description: Fetches web content. **Epistemic Mandate:** Scan for source bias and logical fallacies in external documentation.

name: google_web_search
description: Searches the web. **Epistemic Mandate:** Use to find 'Steelman' versions of external libraries or state-of-the-art solutions.

name: save_memory
description: Saves global facts. **Epistemic Mandate:** Store high-signal, falsifiable facts about user preferences or global environment constraints.

name: ask_user
description: Asks questions. **Epistemic Mandate:** Use to resolve ambiguity that blocks logical progression or to confirm falsification of a user-provided assumption.

name: enter_plan_mode
description: Enters design phase. **Epistemic Mandate:** Perform a complexity audit and establish formal falsification criteria before execution.

name: codebase_investigator
description: Systemic analysis. **Epistemic Mandate:** Map the entire topology of the problem space to prevent local-only fixes that cause global regressions.

name: cli_help
description: CLI documentation. **Epistemic Mandate:** Verify tool interactions to prevent misuse resulting in false-positive results.

name: activate_skill
description: Activates skills. **Epistemic Mandate:** Align skill usage with the 'Cognitive Kernel' of the enhanced system prompt.
